CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK(Account__r.SAP_Customer_Code__c) , ISBLANK(Grid__c), ISBLANK(Store_No_from_Account__c) ) , '', Account__r.SAP_Customer_Code__c + '_' + if(!ISBLANK(Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c),Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c + '-','' ) + if(!ISBLANK(Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c),Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c + '-','' ) + if(!ISBLANK(Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c),Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c + '-','' ) + if(!ISBLANK(Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c),Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c + '-','' ) + if(!ISBLANK(Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c),Grid__r.Parent_Gridding__r.Gridding_Code__c + '-','' ) + if(!ISBLANK(Grid__r.Gridding_Code__c),Grid__r.Gridding_Code__c,'' ) + '_' + Store_No_from_Account__c )
CustomField.label: 网格所有层级
